title: Tries, Prefix Search, and String Algorithms · Cost-Model Clinic: Naive String Search
summary: Build an autocomplete and route-prefix service with predictable matching behavior. Planned artifact: Add and verify the dsa naive string search increment in a Unicode-aware prefix index and matcher. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Trace brute-force substring matching and construct its worst-case repeated-prefix input.
Analyze prefix operations by key length and output size rather than record count alone.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
